items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
The small lucky bag has become a fashion staple for girls in recent years. Its elegant and simple style has won the love of people of all ages. The interior is made of tech nylon, which is lightweight and easy to clean. Even when carrying many items, it helps reduce the burden. The strap features a knot design, allowing for easy adjustment. It can be used as a handbag; after tightening the drawstring, it looks like a cloud bag, making it perfect for summer outfits. Dimensions: 21*16.6*1CM3005s

New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CELINE New HELOISE HOBO Shoulder Bag, a must-have for Autumn/Winter! The rounded and smooth body shape looks a bit like the familiar AVA's enlarged version at first glance ~ Celine never disappoints 🫡 This large Hobo gives a very French lazy and casual vibe. Classic color combinations, stylish and chic, not easy to go out of style. The bag capacity can meet short business trips or daily commute, very practical!
Style No.: 114713
Color: Rock Grey
Size: 30x7.5x28.5

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️
Celine 23 Early Spring Lisa Style Mini Saddle Bag ~ Besace Arc de Triomphe
The real thing is truly beautiful, retro yet stylish, and goes well with any outfit! The curved bottom and flap design make it look younger. Compared to the mini version, the handle design is playful and cute. A style you'll fall in love with at first glance, exuding elegance when photographed. Can be worn crossbody, shoulder, or carried by hand!
Style: Retro, stylish, and cute~
Capacity: Doesn't fit large phones well, but can hold keys, tissues, compact powder, 💄
Model No.: 10K502 Beige Brown (Hardware is pure steel)
Dimensions: 15.5-11.5-5 (with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
❤️【Lady Dio.r My ABC】"Pearlescent Pink"
/5-Grid Lambskin/
This handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from fine lambskin with a signature herringbone stitching for quilting details, its elegant and classic design is timeless. Finished with matching enamel, lined with sheep suede, and featuring a chain shoulder strap with an internal zip pocket, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 24×20×11 cm

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
SERPENTI FOREVER Mini Tote, crafted from calfskin, combining a modern look with practical wearability for a stylish look. The piece features a serpent chain and leather shoulder strap, accented with the iconic serpent head magnetic clasp, drawing inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection. It is equipped with a compartment, a front pocket, an external back patch pocket, an internal open pocket, and an internal mirror pouch with a customizable vanity mirror, with a BVLGARI metal logo on the back.
Style: 293666
Size: 19 X 11 X 6

💗Large Monogram
Brand new FEND1 First is here!!
Designed under Kim Jones, this is the first FEND1, overturning the previous bag shape. The metal trim and large Logo lock, combined with the body design, fuse architectural deconstruction with fashion. Elegant yet cool, it grabs attention instantly! Perfect for clutching at evening events, and also gives a high-end street chic vibe when slung!
Large size 32.5x15x23.5cm

items.name_en: Authentic-grade Reproduction Miu Miu 5BB117: New Miu Miu canvas briefcase, perfect fusion of fashion and classic, the next big hit is definitely this one. Canvas fabric paired with calfskin, soft and durable texture. Lighter and more versatile than the full leather version. Stunning in both appearance and practicality. Third-generation long handle design for shoulder carrying. Large size with ample capacity, easily holding various essentials. Perfect choice for work or travel. New canvas lining is more beautiful and durable. Size: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)

Authentic-grade, Original Factory Leather Version
【Black Leather with Strap ❤ Medium】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri, this bag is a flagship product reflecting Dior aesthetics. It holds various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully embodying Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm
